command:
cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: multi-model launchers — OpenRouter + Ollama .bat generator

Add launchers/generate-launchers.cjs that generates 6 .bat files + deskt
cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && git push origin master 2>&1
cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && cat package.json && echo "---" && ls sync/ && echo "---" && ls autoresearch/measures/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && head -30 README.md

cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && cat sync/install.sh | head -30 && echo "---" && ls launchers/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && cat PRODUCTION_GUIDE.md | head -20 && echo "---" && wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c

cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge && wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ls ~/.hermes/skills/ 2>/dev/null" && echo "---" && wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ls ~/.hermes/skills/cc-agents/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l && ls ~/.herm

ls C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge/.claude 2>/dev/null && echo "has-claude-dir" || echo "no-claude-dir" && wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ls ~/.hermes/skills/frxncois-agents/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l && ls ~/.hermes

curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 5 http://localhost:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null | xargs echo "ollama:" && grep -q "OPENROUTER_API_KEY" C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge/.env 2>/dev/null && ec

cd "C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge" && git add README.md
git commit -m "docs: update README"
git push

cd C:/Za 2>/dev/null
echo "=== stale .forge-session.json ==="; [ -f .forge-session.json ] && cat .forge-session.json || echo "none"
echo "=== claude-hermes-bridge tree ==="; ls -la C:/Za/claude-hermes

cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge
echo "=== sync/ ==="; ls -la sync/ 2>&1
echo "=== launchers/ ==="; ls -la launchers/ 2>&1
echo "=== docs/ ==="; ls -la docs/ 2>&1
echo "=== .bat files anywhere ==="; find

cd C:/Za/claude-hermes-bridge
echo "=== autoresearch/lib/llm.cjs (head) ==="; head -80 autoresearch/lib/llm.cjs 2>&1
echo "=== grep deepseek across repo ==="; grep -ri "deepseek" . --include=*.cjs --i
